title: Rosetta Stone PCF Family Certification Table

families.proof_sketch:
-- Proof sketch: PCF → ₂F₁ → Gamma reduction
-- Family: a_template=[(0, 0), (-3, -2), (-2, 0)], b=[2, 3]
-- Ratios: {1: Fraction(5, 3), 2: Fraction(7, 5), 3: Fraction(9, 7), 4: Fraction(11, 9), 5: Fraction(13, 11)}

-- m=0: Value = (p/q) · ₂F₁(-2.0, -2.0; 1.0; 1)
--   By Gauss summation: ₂F₁(a,b;c;1) = Γ(c)Γ(c-a-b)/(Γ(c-a)Γ(c-b))
--   Condition c-a-b = 5.0 > 0 ✓
--   Apply Legendre duplication: Γ(z)Γ(z+1/2) = √π·Γ(2z)/2^(2z-1)

-- m=1: Value = (p/q) · ₂F₁(-1.5, -1.0; 4.5; 1)
--   By Gauss summation: ₂F₁(a,b;c;1) = Γ(c)Γ(c-a-b)/(Γ(c-a)Γ(c-b))
--   Condition c-a-b = 7.0 > 0 ✓
--   Apply Legendre duplication: Γ(z)Γ(z+1/2) = √π·Γ(2z)/2^(2z-1)

-- m=2: Value = (p/q) · ₂F₁(-1.5, 1.0; 5.5; 1)
--   By Gauss summation: ₂F₁(a,b;c;1) = Γ(c)Γ(c-a-b)/(Γ(c-a)Γ(c-b))
--   Condition c-a-b = 6.0 > 0 ✓
--   Apply Legendre duplication: Γ(z)Γ(z+1/2) = √π·Γ(2z)/2^(2z-1)

-- m=3: Value = (p/q) · ₂F₁(-2.0, 1.0; 2.5; 1)
--   By Gauss summation: ₂F₁(a,b;c;1) = Γ(c)Γ(c-a-b)/(Γ(c-a)Γ(c-b))
--   Condition c-a-b = 3.5 > 0 ✓
--   Apply Legendre duplication: Γ(z)Γ(z+1/2) = √π·Γ(2z)/2^(2z-1)

-- m=4: Value = (p/q) · ₂F₁(-1.5, -1.0; 4.5; 1)
--   By Gauss summation: ₂F₁(a,b;c;1) = Γ(c)Γ(c-a-b)/(Γ(c-a)Γ(c-b))
--   Condition c-a-b = 7.0 > 0 ✓
--   Apply Legendre duplication: Γ(z)Γ(z+1/2) = √π·Γ(2z)/2^(2z-1)

-- m=5: Value = (p/q) · ₂F₁(-2.0, 1.0; 2.5; 1)
--   By Gauss summation: ₂F₁(a,b;c;1) = Γ(c)Γ(c-a-b)/(Γ(c-a)Γ(c-b))
--   Condition c-a-b = 3.5 > 0 ✓
--   Apply Legendre duplication: Γ(z)Γ(z+1/2) = √π·Γ(2z)/2^(2z-1)

-- theorem family_closed_form (m : ℕ) :
--   V(m) = [closed form expression] := by
--   induction m with
--   | zero => simp [V, pcf_eval, hyp2f1_gauss]
--   | succ n ih => 
--     rw [V_ratio_recurrence]  -- V(n+1)/V(n) = r(n)
--     exact ih ▸ ratio_closed_form n
